stories.title: 'He's got the stuff and backs it up': MLB All-Star...
stories.summary: From Miz's heat to Schwarbombs to everything Ohtani brings, these players are why baseball is having a moment.

stories.title: MLB All-Star Game: Predictions, live updates and t...
stories.summary: Baseball's best are in Philly. Here are the matchups we want to see and what our experts think will happen.

stories.title: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
stories.summary: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

stories.title: Embattled Michigan AD Manuel not ready to go
stories.summary: Michigan athletic director Warde Manuel is defending his resume; and says he does not want to leave the school.

stories.title: Herro wants to 'move on' from Bam altercation
stories.summary: Bucks guard Tyler Herro said he wants to "move on" from his physical altercation with former teammate Bam Adebayo last week in Las Vegas and is "focused on the next chapter in Milwaukee."
